title: Decision MB/2026/03 of the Management Board of the Agency for Support for BEREC (‘the BEREC Office’) on the appointment of the Co-Chairs of the Expert Networking Groups
text:
Decision No MB/2026/03
of the Management Board of the Agency for Support for BEREC
(‘the BEREC Office’) on the appointment of the Co-Chairs of the
Expert Networking Groups
The Management Board of the BEREC Office,
Having regard to Regulation (EU) 2018/1971 of the European Parliament and of the Council
of 11 December 2018 establishing the Body of European Regulators for Electronic
Communications (BEREC) and the Agency for Support for BEREC (’BEREC Office’),
amending Regulation (EU) 2015/2120 and repealing Regulation (EC) No 1211/20091, and in
particular Articles 5;
Having regard to Rules of Procedure of the Management Board of the BEREC Office2, and
in particular to Article 12 thereof;
Having regard to the Rules of Procedure on the operation of Expert Networking Groups3, and
in particular Article 2 thereof;
Having regard to Single Programming Document of the Activities of the Agency for Support
for BEREC ('BEREC Office') for the period 2026-20284;
Whereas,
1) The Management Board of the BEREC Office may decide to create Expert Networking
Groups (ENG) to deliver expertise on specific matters requested by the BEREC Office;
2) Two Co-Chairs appointed by the Management Board of the BEREC Office shall lead
each ENG;
3) Each ENG shall be composed of members appointed by the NRAs according to
specific criteria depending on the relevant area of expertise;
4) With the adoption of the Single Programming Document of the Activities of the Agency
for Support for BEREC ('BEREC Office') for the period 2026-2028 the Management
Board has continued work of three Expert Networking Groups;
5) The Management Board of the BEREC Office shall approve the decision that appoints
the Co-Chairs of the Expert Networking Groups.
1 OJ L 321, 17.12.2018, p. 1–35 (BG, ES, CS, DA, DE, ET, EL, EN, FR, GA, HR, IT, LV, LT, HU, MT,
NL, PL, PT, RO, SK, SL, FI, SV); https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-
content/EN/TXT/?qid=1575289447726&uri=CELEX:32018R1971;
2 MB (19) 95Rev.1, Rules of Procedure of the Management Board of the BEREC Office, 04 October
2019;
3 MB (19) 108, Rules of Procedure on the operation of Expert Networking Groups, 06 December 2019;
4 MB (25) 79, Single Programming Document of the Activities of the Agency for Support for BEREC
('BEREC Office') for the period 2024-2026, 5 December 2025.

MB (26) 10
Has adopted the following decision:
Article 1
The following candidates are appointed as the Expert Networking Groups Co-Chairs for the
period of 2 years (until 31 December 2027):
a) For ENG for ICT:
Co-Chair: Álvaro Ferro (ANACOM),
Co-Chair: Edgars Konovalovs (BEREC Office).
b) For ENG for Communications:
Co-Chair: Paola Calestani Hildebrandt (AGCOM),
Co-Chair: Catalina Dragomir (ANCOM).
c) For ENG for Sustainability:
Co-Chair: Tea Connolly (ComReg),
Co-Chair: Grischa Hadjamu (BEREC Office).
Article 2
This decision shall enter into force on the day of its adoption by the Management Board of the
BEREC Office.
Done in Ljubljana, on 23 February 2026.
For the Management Board
Marko Mišmaš
Management Board Chairperson 2026
Electronically signed on 24/02/2026 18:14 (UTC+01) in accordance with Article 11 of Commission Decision (EU) 2021/2121
author: BEREC Office MB
